Both bathroom sinks drain super slowly. Tried Drano and a plunger, no luck. The house has old cast iron drain pipes. Might need them snaked or possibly replaced.

Need to rough in plumbing for a new bathroom in the basement. Want a toilet, vanity sink, and shower stall. The main drain line runs through the basement ceiling about 8 feet away from where I want the bathroom.
The main shutoff valve is stuck and leaking. It's a gate valve that hasn't been turned in probably 20 years. Every time I try to turn it, it leaks more. Need it replaced with a ball valve.

Garbage disposal is completely jammed and making a humming noise when I turn it on. Tried the hex key underneath and pressing the reset button. Think something hard fell in there.
Sewer line backed up again for the third time this year. Camera inspection showed tree roots have infiltrated the clay pipe about 40 feet from the house. Need at least that section replaced.
Outdoor hose bib froze and burst during the cold snap last week. There's a crack in the pipe right where it goes through the foundation wall. Need it repaired before it causes more damage.

Small bathroom ceiling has black mold spots showing through the paint. The exhaust fan doesn't vent outside, it goes into the attic. Need the mold treated and ceiling repainted properly.
Our rental property needs to be painted before new tenants move in next week. Standard 3 bedroom ranch, walls only, about 1200 sq ft. White throughout is fine.

Just had drywall patched where we removed a wall between the kitchen and living room. The patches are visible and the texture doesn't match. Need it properly textured and painted to blend in.
Deck hasn't been stained in 5 years and the boards are starting to split. It's a 12x16 composite and wood deck with railings. Need it sanded, repaired, and stained.
Kids drew all over their bedroom walls with permanent marker. Tried magic erasers and alcohol but it won't come off completely. Room is about 10x10, might just need to prime and repaint.

Had a major hailstorm last week. Insurance adjuster is coming Friday but I can see significant granule loss and several cracked shingles from the ground. Roof is about 15 years old, architectural shingles.
Noticed a water stain on the master bedroom ceiling after the last rain. Went into the attic and found daylight coming through near the chimney. The step flashing looks completely rusted out.

The vent pipe boot on the roof is cracked and I can see daylight around it from the attic. It's the PVC vent for the main bathroom. Just the boot needs replacing.

Tree fell on the garage roof during a storm. Punched a hole about 4x6 feet through the shingles and decking into the attic. Currently covered with a tarp.
